properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our Father, Creator You hold our hearts together There’s no one higher than You Redeemer, Defender Our great and mighty Savior There’s no one higher than You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are always with us Gracious to forgive us By Your power we’ve been set free

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And Lord we stand amazed in Your presence Astounded by Your mercy and love Our hands are lifted high in surrender Your grace for me is always enough And there is no one higher than our God There is no one greater than You Let my life forever praise the glory of Your name There is no one higher than You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Majestic in wonder You reign with love forever There’s no one higher than You Your beauty, Your splendor Your glory knows no measure There’s no one higher than You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are always with us Gracious to forgive us By Your power we’ve been set free

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And Lord we stand amazed in Your presence Astounded by Your mercy and love Our hands are lifted high in surrender Your grace for me is always enough And there is no one higher than our God There is no one greater than You Let my life forever praise the glory of Your name There is no one higher than You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: No, no There's no one higher than You, oh

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: /: There is no one higher, no one greater, no one like our God There is none more able, Christ our Savior, great and glorious :/ x6

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Lord we stand amazed in Your presence Astounded by Your mercy and love Our hands are lifted high in surrender Your grace for me is always enough And there is no one higher than our God

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: There is no one greater than You Let my life forever praise the glory of Your name There is no one higher than You No, there is no one higher than You
